title: BEM-850 route blocker
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/protocols']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:26 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem849_extract_protocol_blocker.json')
lines=prev.get('blocker_lines',[])
joined=' '.join(lines).lower()
if not lines:
    status='blocker_extraction_failed'
    next_action='inspect full BEM845 draft and improve extraction'
elif any(k in joined for k in ['not approved','blocked','missing proof','triad','dispatch', 'runtime', 'response']):
    status='blocker_is_proof_or_runtime_gap'
    next_action='document actual proof triad and re-request Claude approval with evidence paths'
else:
    status='blocker_is_protocol_clarification'
    next_action='patch protocol with extracted blocker clarifications and re-request Claude approval'
patch=Path('governance/protocols/BEM850_BLOCKER_REPAIR_PLAN.md')
patch.write_text('# BEM-850 | Blocker Repair Plan'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+sep+'## Extracted blocker lines'+sep+sep+'\n'.join('- '+x for x in lines[:40])+sep+sep+'## Next action'+sep+sep+next_action+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-850','status':status,'blocker_lines_count':len(lines),'repair_plan':str(patch),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem850_route_extracted_blocker.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem850_route_extracted_blocker.md').write_text('# BEM-850 | Route Extracted Blocker | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem850_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-850'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(patch),'governance/state/bem850_route_extracted_blocker.json','governance/reports/bem850_route_extracted_blocker.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem850_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Routed extracted Claude blocker into a concrete repair plan before re-requesting protocol approval')
"""
No issue comments.
